blended.narrative: Le Relais is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,248 ft. Looking ahead, 41 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
